## Entities.Converters.Confections.fillingOptionEntities variable

Converter for filling options with preferred selection. Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
fillingOptionEntities: Converter<Model.IOptionsWithPreferred<AnyFillingOptionEntity, FillingOptionId>>
```
